metadata.title: YourPulse - Your Writing Activity Visualised
metadata.description: YourPulse - Your Writing Activity Visualised Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: error
ast.source: LinkedNotesCompiler error:
ast.target: LinkedNotesCompiler 错误：

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef requires a render function but was given %s.
ast.target: forwardRef 需要一个渲染函数，但收到的是 %s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions accept exactly two parameters: props and ref. %s
ast.target: forwardRef 渲染函数仅接受两个参数：props 和 ref。%s

ast.source: Failed %s type: %s
ast.target: 失败的 %s 类型：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Component %s declared `PropTypes` instead of `propTypes`. Did you misspell the property assignment?
ast.target: 组件 %s 声明了 `PropTypes` 而不是 `propTypes`。你是否拼写错误了属性赋值？

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid attribute `ref` supplied to `React.Fragment`.
ast.target: 为 `React.Fragment` 提供了无效的属性 `ref`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser doesn't support requestAnimationFrame. Make sure that you load a polyfill in older browsers. https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills

ast.name: error

ast.target: 此浏览器不支持 cancelAnimationFrame。请确保在旧版浏览器中加载 polyfill。https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills

ast.name: error

ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the status bar stats for this plugin. Useful if you want to keep your workspace clean and distraction-free.
ast.target: 隐藏此插件的状态栏统计。如果你想保持工作区整洁无干扰，这很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: List of files to be shared publicly via YourPulse.com profile (one per line).
ast.target: 通过 YourPulse.com 个人资料公开分享的文件列表（每行一个）。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: the projection could not be fit to the specified domain; using the default scale.
ast.target: 警告：投影无法拟合到指定域；将使用默认比例尺。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: the implicit z channel has high cardinality. This may occur when the fill or stroke channel is associated with quantitative data rather than ordinal or categorical data. You can suppress this warning by setting the z option explicitly; if this data represents a single series, set z to null.
ast.target: 警告：隐式 z 通道的基数很高。当填充或描边通道与定量数据而非序数或类别数据关联时可能发生。你可以显式设置 z 选项来抑制此警告；如果这些数据表示单个序列，请将 z 设为 null。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can also mark a note for publishing by adding `yp-publish: true` to its file properties (frontmatter)
ast.target: 你也可以在其文件属性（frontmatter）中添加 `yp-publish: true` 来标记该笔记可发布
